product: Custom Docker images for AI Runtime CLI workloads (Beta) ​
tagline: June 29, 2026 You can now bring your own Docker container image to AI Runtime CLI ( air ) workloads.
what_it_does: June 29, 2026 You can now bring your own Docker container image to AI Runtime CLI ( air ) workloads. This feature is in [Beta](/aws/en/release notes/release types).
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
